rationale: Review 1's sound approve produces an equivalent-or-better PR; Review 2's proposed refactors (reversing derivation order, changing sqrtTower indexing to Finset/Fintype, rewriting the Quadratic carrier to quantify over F, etc.) are design preferences with no material generality defect in the diff (the provided ℕ/Fin/Fintype statements already expose full generality without wrong constraints, and the Nat-tower induction is a valid choice). The only distinctions are stylistic/contested nits a maintainer would not require.
